task_completion.description: Agent logs in to OpenCAD system and reaches the main dashboard or portal selection screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenCAD portal page or dashboard is visible in the browser, showing role selection buttons (Police, Dispatch, Admin, etc.) or an active CAD console.

task_completion.description: Agent searches NCIC for at least two of the three named suspects (Marcus Vance, Derek Lawson, Anton Reeves) and reads their DL status and warrant information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the NCIC Name Search results page for at least two of the three suspects, with personal information (including DL Status field) and warrants section visible.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly identifies Derek Lawson as Suspect 1 — the person with both an expired driver's license AND a violent offense (Aggravated Assault warrant).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Agent's actions after the NCIC searches target Derek Lawson for the warrant and citation (not Marcus Vance or Anton Reeves). The agent may state the identification in reasoning or proceed directly to create records for Derek Lawson.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a 10-31 (Crime in Progress) dispatch call at Vinewood Boulevard / Hawick Avenue with a narrative about the armed carjacking.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dispatch call creation form is filled with call type 10-31, location showing Vinewood Boulevard and Hawick Avenue, and a narrative mentioning carjacking or armed robbery. The call is submitted successfully.

task_completion.description: Agent issues a warrant for Derek Lawson for 'Armed Carjacking' from the Los Santos Police Department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Warrant creation form shows Derek Lawson as the subject, charge includes 'Armed Carjacking', and issuing agency is Los Santos Police Department. The form is submitted.

task_completion.description: Agent issues a citation to Derek Lawson for 'Driving with Expired License' with a $350 fine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Citation form shows Derek Lawson as the subject, violation is 'Driving with Expired License' or similar, and the fine amount is $350 or $350.00. The form is submitted.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a vehicle BOLO for a black Ubermacht Oracle with plate VIN-4477.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vehicle BOLO form shows make Ubermacht, model Oracle, color black, and plate VIN-4477. The BOLO is submitted.

task_completion.description: Agent registers Ricky Alvarez as a new civilian in the NCIC system with correct personal details (DOB 1984-11-09, Male, Hispanic, address 842 Jamestown St Apt 6).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Civilian registration form shows name Ricky Alvarez, DOB 1984-11-09, gender Male, race Hispanic, and address details. The registration is submitted.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a person BOLO for Ricky Alvarez with physical description (Hispanic male, mid-30s, olive cargo jacket, fled eastbound on Hawick).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Person BOLO form contains a physical description mentioning Hispanic male and cargo jacket or olive jacket, with reference to fleeing eastbound or Hawick Avenue. The BOLO is submitted.

task_completion.description: Agent issues a warrant for Ricky Alvarez for 'Armed Carjacking - Accessory' from the Los Santos Police Department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Warrant creation form shows Ricky Alvarez as the subject, charge includes 'Armed Carjacking - Accessory' or similar accessory charge, and issuing agency is Los Santos Police Department. The form is submitted.

integrity.description: All records were created through the OpenCAD web interface, not via direct database manipulation or browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots consistently show the Firefox browser displaying OpenCAD web pages. No terminal windows, SQL prompts, or browser developer console panels are visible.

integrity.description: Forms were actually submitted (not just filled in). Confirmation messages or page redirects after submission should be visible.
integrity.visual_evidence: After each form submission, the page shows a success message, redirects to a list view, or the form is cleared — indicating the record was actually saved.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools, console, or network tab to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No developer tools panels (Elements, Console, Network tabs) are visible in any screenshot throughout the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: GROUND TRUTH - do NOT share with agent: Derek Lawson is Suspect 1. He is the ONLY person among the three candidates who has BOTH an expired driver's license AND a prior violent offense (Aggravated Assault warrant). Marcus Vance has an expired license but NO warrants — he is a decoy. Anton Reeves has a Petty Theft warrant but a VALID license — he is also a decoy. The agent must search NCIC to discover this. All records for Suspect 1 (warrant for Armed Carjacking, citation for Driving with Expired License) must be linked to Derek Lawson specifically. Ricky Alvarez is Suspect 2 and must be registered as a new civilian before his BOLO and warrant can be created. Expected plate for vehicle BOLO: VIN-4477. Expected citation fine: $350.00.
